title: Iridescent Party Streamers Backdrop - GREATRIL Holographic Tinsel Foil Fringe Curtain for Mermaid/Disco Theme/Euphoria/Eras Party Decor, 1m x 2m, Pack of 2
features: Eye-catching: The GREATRIL iridescent foil fringe curtain is designed to catch the eye and draw attention to any space it is used in.
Shimmering effect: The iridescent foil material creates a shimmering effect that adds a touch of glamour and elegance to any event.

Versatile: This tinsel curtain can be used for a variety of occasions, including weddings, birthday parties, proms, and other special events. And different party themes, like mermaid, disco, Y2K, euphoria party theme decorations.
Easy to install: The fringe curtain is easy to install and can be hung from any surface using tape or string.
Durable: Made from high-quality materials, this curtain is durable and long-lasting, making it perfect for multiple uses.
Affordable: Despite its high-quality design, the iridescent foil fringe curtain is affordable and won't break the bank.
Lightweight: The lightweight design of the fringe curtain makes it easy to transport and store when not in use.
Unique design: The iridescent foil material creates a unique design that sets this curtain apart from other party decorations.
